overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing a character with a large cargo backpack traversing a desolate landscape. The journey progresses from a rocky mountain valley through open grasslands to a misty riverbank, with overcast skies and light rain creating a somber atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain valley with snow-capped peaks ahead

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily through narrow mountain valley toward distant snow-capped peaks

entered.detail: large snow-covered mountain peak visible at the end of the valley
steep rocky cliff face forming the left side of the valley
steep rocky cliff face forming the right side of the valley
patchy grass and rocky ground covering the valley floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow mountain valley with steep rocky walls on both sides. Snow-capped peaks are visible in the distance ahead, and the ground is covered with sparse grass and rocks under an overcast sky.

events.description: exits narrow mountain valley into wide open grassland between rolling rocky hills

agents.ego_description: character walking through tall grass in an open valley, flanked by rocky hills on both sides

entered.detail: expansive field of tall green grass covering the valley floor
rolling rocky hills forming the left boundary of the grassland
rolling rocky hills forming the right boundary of the grassland
large rock outcropping visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide grassland valley with tall grass swaying in the wind. Rocky hills flank both sides of the meadow, and the character continues walking forward through the dense vegetation toward distant rock formations.

events.description: river comes into view in the distance as the valley opens up

agents.ego_description: character walking downhill through grass toward the river visible ahead, maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: wide river with dark water becoming visible at the end of the valley
large boulder formation on the right hillside

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, the valley opens up to reveal a wide river in the distance. The terrain gently descends toward the water, with the grassy path becoming more defined as the riverbank approaches.

events.description: reaches the river's edge and begins walking along the waterfront
light rain begins, visible as droplets on the camera lens

agents.ego_description: character walking along the riverbank with water to the left, occasionally adjusting direction to follow the shoreline

entered.detail: rocky edge where the grass meets the river water
tall brownish grass covering the riverbank where the character walks
misty cliff formations visible across the river on the far shore
small rocky outcroppings rising from the river water

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the riverbank and walks along the water's edge with the river on the left and grassy terrain on the right. Mist rises from the dark water, and light rain begins to fall, visible as droplets on the lens. Distant cliffs and rocky islands emerge through the haze across the river.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rugged mountain pass that gradually opens into a misty, rain-swept river valley. It begins with the character navigating a narrow valley between steep rocky walls, moving toward distant snow-capped peaks under an overcast sky. As the path widens, the scene expands into a broad grassland meadow where tall grass sways between flanking rocky hills. The terrain then gently descends as the valley opens further to reveal a wide river in the distance, with the grassy path leading directly toward the water. Finally, the camera reaches the riverbank, where mist rises from the dark water and light rain begins to fall on the lens as distant cliffs and rocky islands emerge through the haze.
